veo-3.1-generate-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini pricing lists Veo 3.1 Standard at $0.40/s for 720p and 1080p, and $0.60/s for 4k. The 4k rate is represented in the video pricing helper; 1080p and 4k requests are normalized to 8s by CLI constraints.

veo-3.1-fast-generate-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini pricing lists Veo 3.1 Fast at $0.10/s for 720p, $0.12/s for 1080p, and $0.30/s for 4k. The 4k rate is represented in the video pricing helper; 1080p and 4k requests are normalized to 8s by CLI constraints.

veo-3.1-lite-generate-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini pricing lists Veo 3.1 Lite at $0.05/s for 720p and $0.08/s for 1080p. 4k output is not supported.

MiniMax-Hailuo-2.3.pricingNotes: MiniMax video estimates use published block pricing for the selected model/resolution as normalized by AutoShow. Resource bundles, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

grok-imagine-video.pricingTier: xAI public Imagine API video pricing
grok-imagine-video.pricingNotes: xAI Imagine video estimates use published per-second rates, with resolution-specific multipliers normalized by AutoShow. Input image charges, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored unless provider usage is returned.

gen4.5.pricingNotes: Runway Gen-4.5 is priced at 12 credits per second, represented as $0.12/s using the API credit reference. Plan credits, discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.
